apps/uts-dpm-backend/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.13 to align with Java 21 and modern Spring ecosystem.
apps/uts-dpm-backend/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 21 as a baseline and lacks compatibility with newer libraries required for the migration.

apps/uts-dpm-backend/pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java version property to 21 to target the new JDK.
apps/uts-dpm-backend/pom.xml.why_exists: The project must compile against Java 21 features and bytecode version.

apps/uts-dpm-backend/pom.xml.general_idea: Remove explicit version from PostgreSQL driver to rely on Spring Boot BOM management.
Replace springdoc-openapi-ui with springdoc-openapi-starter-webmvc-ui to support Spring Boot 3.
apps/uts-dpm-backend/pom.xml.why_exists: The old springdoc-openapi-ui artifact is incompatible with Spring Boot 3 / Jakarta EE namespace changes.

apps/uts-dpm-backend/pom.xml.general_idea: Remove explicit swagger-annotations dependency as it is now provided transitively or via the new starter.

apps/uts-dpm-backend/src/main/kotlin/com.general_idea: Replace javax.servlet import with jakarta.servlet to align with Jakarta EE namespace used in Spring Boot 3.x and Java 21.
apps/uts-dpm-backend/src/main/kotlin/com.why_exists: javax.servlet classes are no longer available in Spring Boot 3.x / Jakarta EE 9+; using them causes a compile error (unresolved reference).

apps/uts-dpm-backend/src/main/kotlin/com.general_idea: Migrate validation annotation import from javax to jakarta namespace to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.
apps/uts-dpm-backend/src/main/kotlin/com.why_exists: The javax.validation package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ and Spring Boot 3; using it causes a compile-time 'unresolved reference' error.

apps/uts-dpm-backend/src/main/kotlin/com.general_idea: Migrate validation annotations from javax.validation to jakarta.validation to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.
apps/uts-dpm-backend/src/main/kotlin/com.why_exists: javax.validation package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'unresolved reference: javax' on JDK 21 with Spring Boot 3.

apps/uts-dpm-backend/src/main/kotlin/com.general_idea: Replace javax.persistence imports with jakarta.persistence to align with Jakarta EE namespace in Spring Boot 3.
apps/uts-dpm-backend/src/main/kotlin/com.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'unresolved reference: javax' on JDK 21 with Spring Boot 3.

apps/uts-dpm-backend/src/main/kotlin/com.general_idea: Migrate JPA entity annotations from the legacy javax.persistence package to the Jakarta EE namespace.
apps/uts-dpm-backend/src/main/kotlin/com.why_exists: The javax.persistence package was removed from the JDK and replaced by jakarta.persistence in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3.x); using the old import causes a compile error (unresolved reference).

apps/uts-dpm-backend/src/main/kotlin/com.general_idea: Replace javax.servlet imports with jakarta.servlet imports to align with Spring Boot 3.x and Jakarta EE 9+ namespace changes.
apps/uts-dpm-backend/src/main/kotlin/com.why_exists: javax.servlet classes are no longer available in Spring Boot 3.x (which uses Tomcat 10+); using them causes a compile error due to missing class definitions.

apps/uts-dpm-backend/src/main/kotlin/com.general_idea: Migrate JSR-303 validation annotations from the legacy javax namespace to the Jakarta EE namespace.
apps/uts-dpm-backend/src/main/kotlin/com.why_exists: The javax.validation package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3.x), causing a compile-time 'unresolved reference' error.

apps/uts-dpm-backend/src/main/kotlin/com.general_idea: Migrate JSR-303 validation imports from javax.validation to jakarta.validation to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.x.
apps/uts-dpm-backend/src/main/kotlin/com.why_exists: Compile error: package javax.validation does not exist in Jakarta EE 9+ environments (Spring Boot 3.x uses jakarta.* namespace).

apps/uts-dpm-backend/src/main/kotlin/com.general_idea: Migrate validation imports from javax.validation to jakarta.validation to align with Jakarta EE namespace changes in Spring Boot 3.
apps/uts-dpm-backend/src/main/kotlin/com.why_exists: javax.validation package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'unresolved reference: javax' on JDK 21 with Spring Boot 3.

apps/uts-dpm-backend/src/main/kotlin/com.general_idea: Migrate JSR-380 Bean Validation imports from javax.validation to jakarta.validation to align with Jakarta EE 9+ and Spring Boot 3.x requirements.
apps/uts-dpm-backend/src/main/kotlin/com.why_exists: The javax.validation package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code using these imports will fail to compile on JDK 21 with Spring Boot 3.x due to missing classes.
